name: Reflex Dog Snackies Treats Smoked Beef Training Bites 170g
shortDescription: High-protein beef dog treats made with 92% real meat. Grain-free, 100% natural, and perfect for healthy training rewards and everyday snacking.
description: Treat your dog to a wholesome and delicious snack made with 92% real beef , designed to deliver superior nutrition and irresistible taste. These premium beef dog treats are rich in high-quality protein , supporting strong muscles, energy, and overall vitality. Crafted with a grain-free formula , these snacks are ideal for dogs with sensitive stomachs or food intolerances. Made using 100% natural ingredients , they contain no artificial colors, flavors, or preservatives—just clean, honest nutrition you can trust. With a balanced fat level and high protein content, these treats are perfect for daily rewards, training sessions, or simply spoiling your dog with something healthy and satisfying. Key Benefits Very high meat content (92% beef) Grain-free recipe for better digestion High protein (45%) to support muscle strength 100% natural ingredients , no artificial additives Highly palatable and easy to chew Nutritional Information Composition 92% Beef meat 3% Rawhide (100% beef) Natural vegetable glycerin Vegetable by-products Minerals Analytical Constituents Crude Protein: 45% Crude Fat: 5% Crude Ash: 5% Crude Fibre: 1.7% Moisture: 20%
